swipe menu

The Decentralised Entertainment Hub

Watch, play & shop on-chain today.

Latest Developments

We're Turning Back Time
Tuesday, January 2, 2024

$DHB has chosen to start our Ethereum migration with an official delisting from Gate.io and all CEXs. We are the DEcentralised entertainment hub. We never needed any centralised exchanged and never will again.

A Bird's Eye Overview
Tuesday, October 24, 2023

2023 has quickly flashed before our eyes, but we still have many exciting updates coming before yearend. Curious? Here is a quick overview!

Feature Spotlight: Ad Tech
Sunday, October 1, 2023

How we’re doing it differently & why our way is better. Read about why our ad-tech solution is unlike anything else seen across legacy or blockchain markets and how it benefits our whole ecosystem.

Stake $DHB before October end!
Friday, September 22, 2023

Find out more about our highly anticipated partner airdrop for stakers set to commence this November, 2023!

Introducing: Week of Deeds
Monday, September 4, 2023

DeHub's new annual event for rewarding good deeds while giving back to the creators that will shape the future our app.

What's coming to our d'app!
Thursday, August 24, 2023

A breakdown of what features are being shipped out of the development line for the official app launch this September 27th as well as after, with the document regularly updated.

PC, IOS & Android Apps Confirmed!
Wednesday, July 12, 2023

After successful public beta testing of our streaming app, we're delighted to confirm our app is scheduled to officially launch this September 2023, on PC, IOS & Android. TV & Console apps are also pipelined for 2024.

Listing update from Q2 Overview
Wednesday, July 12, 2023

For those finding it hard keeping up with all the channels, here’s a dedicated update for listing queries.

DeHub Closes Funding Round.
Sunday, June 4, 2023

We're delighted to announce we've secured our first funding round. Find the breakdown in our latest blog post linked here.

Beta D'App Launch!
Saturday, March 25, 2023

Join our beta for our biggest d'app yet. This is our main hub and completes our core zones ready for IOS and Android stores. Work with the devs to build the greatest platform in the world earning tips in the process!

Staking Update & Exchange Guide
Monday, May 22, 2023

Addressing some important queries from the community regarding the upgraded staking protocol and exchange user guide.

Q2 Overview
Tuesday, April 18, 2023

A bird’s eye view of our near distant future, including goals and targets we aim to hit this quarter.

Town Hall Returns
Monday, April 3, 2023

It feels like just yesterday we were going over the 2022 wrap-up, and now we find ourselves in April, with only 3 quarters left of the year. Enjoy this overview of all developments and upcoming plans.

The Island
Friday, February 10, 2023

A hyperrealistic multi layer programmable 3D/VR island & game map built by the DeHub gaming team. It will serve as the home to a number of exciting and upcoming games such as the MMA Battle Royale for LCFC.

2022 Wrap-Up
Wednesday, January 4, 2023

Thanks to each and every one of the team, community and contributors we have been ploughing through our roadmap and setting ourself up for the biggest year yet. Dive back through the year just passed & the one ahead.

Streaming Test Net Live
Saturday, December 17, 2022

Test out our latest and potentially greatest d'app yet! Join our communities or reach out to the dev team to provide us with valuable feedback at this key stage in our developments.

Banking on Zero Official Trailer (2023)
Saturday, November 19, 2022

The deepest, darkest and most uncensored dive into the rampant rise and fall of a man once dubbed the next Warren Buffett.

Join us & Jorge "Gamebred" Masvidal as we dive...
Thursday, April 28, 2022

...deep into the life and times of British MMA pioneer and legend Brad “One Punch” Pickett. All this and more in episode 2 of our genesis original production streaming now!

Play & Win to Earn Arcade Beta!
Tuesday, April 19, 2022

It's now possible to play-and-earn on more games than there are currently in the entire crypto market. Totally free to earn while playing classic, fun & simple mini games. The more you stake, the more you earn.

Grand Opening of UK HQ!
Thursday, June 30, 2022

In response to a shift in regulatory stance by the UK government towards becoming an NFT hub we’ve registered a new company in the UK under the name of DeLabs LTD and opened a new office in our home town!

Featured In

We Won Something!

DeHub is officially Corporate LiveWire’s 2023 Innovation and Excellence Winner, coming in first place under the “Gaming” category.

DeHub Announces Bold Metaverse Plans in Yahoo Finance Article

With a readership that spans all four corners of the globe, Yahoo Finance is the world’s largest business news platform. A natural home for a piece that introduces our mission to...

DeHub Named by Investing.com as a Project of Interest in the Metaverse Goldrush

DeHub is in the limelight once again — this time, we’ve made an appearance in the crypto category on Investing.com. Reaching 46 million users each month...

GQ Touts DeHub as Top Blockchain Project to Watch

Publishing powerhouse GQ boasts 51.6 million unique online users and 40.5 million social followers. That's why we’re thrilled to announce that we've been featured in GQ South Africa as their top...

DeHub Builds Off-Chain Presence in US Weekly Article

It’s been another busy week for DeHub in the media. Recently, we featured in US Weekly — a celebrity and entertainment magazine. With a readership of over 50 million people...

DeHub’s ‘Redefining Vision’ Turns Heads at Entrepreneur.com

DeHub is making waves in the press again, hitting the headlines at Entrepreneur.com this time. With over 15 million followers on social media and more than 20 million unique users each month...

Explore the Hub

Watch

View protocol & user generated content, create your own PPV or strap bounties to any post rewarding your fans in any supported tokens across 3 chains.

Play

Free, fun and rewarding arcade games & immersive experiences . Buy or earn tokens in our arcade to spend or use across all of our d'apps today.

Shop

Browse, mint & soon trade on our phygital collectables marketplace. Truly own real world assets & spend your token earnings on an array of products.

Clubs

Lock your $DHB tokens to gain enhanced features and experiences across all d'apps and events while claiming your fair share of variable rewards.

Learn

Educational content and guides to onboard anyone into the wonderful world of DeHub & web3. VR and IRL coming soon to a high street near you!

Fun, free & rewarding games!

Founding Team

Malik Jan Founder
Building DeHub & SEC-licensed developer Puso Group. Senior at UKFTSE100 Randstad & 7 figure charity fundraising manager.
Mike Hales Co-Founder
Founder of First Class Management, the UK's largest TikTok partner agency with 400 influencers exclusively on his books.
Indi Jay Cammish Co-Founder
Social media, content & dance expert. Co-founder of the UK's number 1 TikTok influencer agency comms & client relations.
Aleksandr Pasevin CTO
Original builder of the DeHub app, now advising. Also the founder of Hype Experiences & Developer at Open Zeppelin.
Bailey Young Operations
Significant early contributor who joined the team pushing our operational & business development
Fred Dunaway Operations
Previously built an FCA licensed cryptocurrency brokerage with a number of large scale exits to his name.

1 Announcements
Dec 28, 2023

Important Notice!

$DHB is currently in the middle of an Ethereum migration and will be listed on Uniswap for trading by the 29th of January. Our shop is also being updated, so all listings and products are temporarily unavailable.

  1. We've chosen to Delist from Gate.io and burn their tokens, read why here .

  2. We're migrating our entire tech stack and will relaunch after tests and audits.

  3. There will be no presale so stay up to date for official listing times.

  4. No more CEXs, we're fully on-chain here.

Gate holders are required to fill in this form for recovery claims.
